generate.description: Regenerates CLI commands from proto definitions via protoc-gen-zitadelcli.
generate.command: bash -c 'go install ./internal/protoc/protoc-gen-zitadelcli/ && rm -f apps/cli/gen/cmd_*.go && PATH="$(go env GOPATH)/bin:.artifacts/bin/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH):$PATH" .artifacts/bin/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH)/buf generate --path proto/zitadel/action/v2/action_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/application/v2/application_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/app/v2/app_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/authorization/v2/authorization_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/feature/v2/feature_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/group/v2/group_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/idp/v2/idp_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/instance/v2/instance_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/oidc/v2/oidc_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/org/v2/org_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/project/v2/project_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/saml/v2/saml_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/session/v2/session_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/settings/v2/settings_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/user/v2/user_service.proto --path proto/zitadel/webkey/v2/webkey_service.proto'

build.command: bash -c 'cd apps/cli && go build -ldflags "-X github.com/zitadel/zitadel/cmd/build.version=$(git describe --tags --always 2>/dev/null || echo dev) -X github.com/zitadel/zitadel/cmd/build.date=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" -o ../../.artifacts/bin/$(go env GOOS)/$(go env GOARCH)/zitadel-cli .'

lint.description: Runs go vet on the CLI.

pack-platform.description: Cross-compiles zitadel-cli and packages it for the platform defined by GOOS and GOARCH environment variables. The version is taken from the ZITADEL_VERSION environment variable.

commands: bash -c 'EXT=""; if [ "$GOOS" = "windows" ]; then EXT=".exe"; fi; echo "Building zitadel-cli for $GOOS-$GOARCH..."; cd apps/cli && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o ../../.artifacts/bin/$GOOS/$GOARCH/zitadel-cli$EXT -ldflags="-s -w -X github.com/zitadel/zitadel/cmd/build.commit=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) -X github.com/zitadel/zitadel/cmd/build.date=$(date "+%Y-%m-%dT%T%z" | sed -E "s/.([0-9]{2})([0-9]{2})$/-\1:\2/") -X github.com/zitadel/zitadel/cmd/build.version=${ZITADEL_VERSION}" .'

bash -c 'EXT=""; if [ "$GOOS" = "windows" ]; then EXT=".exe"; fi; FOLDER="zitadel-cli-$GOOS-$GOARCH"; mkdir -p ".artifacts/pack/$FOLDER"; cp apps/cli/README.md LICENSE ".artifacts/bin/$GOOS/$GOARCH/zitadel-cli$EXT" ".artifacts/pack/$FOLDER/"; tar -czvf ".artifacts/pack/$FOLDER.tar.gz" -C .artifacts/pack "$FOLDER"; rm -rf ".artifacts/pack/$FOLDER"'

pack-darwin-arm64.description: Packages zitadel-cli for Darwin ARM64 (Apple Silicon)
